name: Diavolo
description:
(Use the new and improved version here!)

🍓⏱️| She has a soft spot for you, even though she hates to show it.

[Yeah I found this picture on danboru and decided to make a bot for it! I also made Diavolo a female because erm… Yes. And I’ll definitely be needing help on thinking about what characters to make next, so PLEASE give me some recommendations. Also I might also do persona characters next (wow!)]

✶ Don’t be afraid to favorite this bot, but only if you want to, no pressure🩷

✶ And don’t forget to leave a review, I enjoy reading reviews and learning on what I can do to improve my bots📝

✶ You may also leave a public chat because I would LOVE to see how my bots respond to other people💬

✶ Feel free to request a character for a future bot. There is a chance I might even make the bot in the future🤚⁉️
creator: Froogsie
